name: wxcode-admin-volt-energy
title: Volt Admin
description: Deep-navy control-room admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0a0e14), raised panels, amber (#fbbf24) + cyan (#22d3ee) dual-accent on a steel-blue neutral ramp, Inter type with tabular figures, and dense hairline-bordered tables. Archetype = region-switcher navbar + icon rail + 4 KPI tiles + full-width status board (entity rows with state pills) + dual-series SVG trend chart + alerts panel + entity side panel, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for real-time operational consoles that must read at a glance.

query.en: Apply this deep-navy control-room admin aesthetic to my domain — near-black canvas, amber + cyan dual accent, region-switcher navbar, icon rail, 4 KPI tiles, a full-width status board with state pills, a dual-series trend chart with an alerts panel and an entity side panel, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个深海军蓝控制室风格应用到我的领域：近黑底色、琥珀+青色双重强调色、区域切换导航栏、图标侧栏、4 个 KPI 卡片、带状态标签的全宽状态看板、双系列趋势图和告警面板及实体侧边栏，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
